mapper.select: SELECT id, name, parent_id, level, description, difficulty, category AS domain, 1 AS importance, create_time, update_time FROM knowledge_point ORDER BY level ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, name, parent_id, level, description, difficulty, category AS domain, 1 AS importance, create_time, update_time FROM knowledge_point WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, name, parent_id, level, description, difficulty, category AS domain, 1 AS importance, create_time, update_time FROM knowledge_point WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO knowledge_point (name, parent_id, level, description, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{parentId}, #{level}, #{description}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE knowledge_point SET name = #{name}, parent_id = #{parentId}, level = #{level}, description = #{description}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO knowledge_relationship (source_id, target_id, relation_type, create_time) VALUES (#{sourceId}, #{targetId}, #{relationType}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_knowledge_mastery WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND knowledge_id = #{knowledgeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_knowledge_mastery (user_id, knowledge_id, mastery_level, score, last_practice_time, practice_count, correct_count, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{knowledgeId}, #{masteryLevel}, #{score}, #{lastPracticeTime}, #{practiceCount}, #{correctCount}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE user_knowledge_mastery SET mastery_level = #{masteryLevel}, score = #{score}, last_practice_time = #{lastPracticeTime}, practice_count = #{practiceCount}, correct_count = #{correctCount}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.problem_id) as problemCount, SUM(CASE WHEN s.result = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as correctCount, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN s.result = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100, 2) as correctRate, COUNT(DISTINCT k.knowledge_id) as newMasteredKnowledge FROM submit s LEFT JOIN problem p ON s.problem_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user_knowledge_mastery k ON s.user_id = k.user_id AND k.last_practice_time BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND s.create_time BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.problem_id) as problemCount, SUM(CASE WHEN s.result = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as correctCount, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN s.result = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100, 2) as correctRate, COUNT(DISTINCT k.knowledge_id) as newMasteredKnowledge FROM submit s LEFT JOIN problem p ON s.problem_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user_knowledge_mastery k ON s.user_id = k.user_id AND DATE_FORMAT(k.last_practice_time, '%Y-%m') = CONCAT(#{year}, '-', LPAD(#{month}, 2, '0')) WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND DATE_FORMAT(s.create_time, '%Y-%m') = CONCAT(#{year}, '-', LPAD(#{month}, 2, '0'))
SELECT mastery_level as level, COUNT(*) as count FROM user_knowledge_mastery WHERE user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY mastery_level ORDER BY mastery_level ASC

SELECT k.name as knowledgeName, AVG(km.mastery_level) as avgMasteryLevel, COUNT(km.user_id) as userCount FROM knowledge_point k LEFT JOIN user_knowledge_mastery km ON k.id = km.knowledge_id GROUP BY k.id, k.name ORDER BY avgMasteryLevel ASC

SELECT p.knowledge_points as knowledgePoints, COUNT(*) as errorCount FROM submit s JOIN problem p ON s.problem_id = p.id WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND s.result != 0 GROUP BY p.knowledge_points ORDER BY errorCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT kp.id, kp.name, kp.parent_id as parentId, kp.level, kp.description, COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) as problemCount FROM knowledge_point kp LEFT JOIN problem p ON FIND_IN_SET(kp.name, p.knowledge_points) > 0 GROUP BY kp.id, kp.name, kp.parent_id, kp.level, kp.description ORDER BY problemCount DESC, kp.id ASC
